text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it, Big Brother. I won.
choice_data_list: That's right, you did! Hold your head up high!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it, Big Sister. I won.
choice_data_list: That's right, you did! Hold your head up high!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hold my head up? Um, uh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-ahem! H-how's this? Am I doing it right?
choice_data_list: Let's win the next one too!
Let's win the next one too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-ahem! H-how's this? Am I doing it right?
choice_data_list: Let's win the next one too!
Let's win the next one too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're proud... of me? That's kinda
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... it also makes me happy to hear you say
that...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... it also makes me happy to hear you say
that...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy... but embarrassed... Ahhh, I don't know
what to think!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I also want to win again and make
everyone happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So please don't hold back during training!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So please don't hold back during training!
